title: Mediterranean Fish Pilaf
description: A flavorful gluten-free dish made with succulent fish, savory pilaf, and a hint of Mediterranean spices.

ingredients.name: Fish Fillets
ingredients.notes: Any white fish works well, such as cod or tilapia

ingredients.name: Rice Pilaf
ingredients.notes: Make sure the pilaf is gluten-free

ingredients.name: Mediterranean Seasoning
ingredients.notes: A blend of herbs like thyme, oregano, and rosemary

ingredients.name: Lemon Juice
ingredients.notes: Freshly squeezed for the best flavor

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For cooking the fish and pilaf

ingredients.name: Cherry Tomatoes
ingredients.notes: Halved for a pop of color

instructions: Season the fish fillets with Mediterranean seasoning and lemon juice.
Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the fish fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side until cooked through.
Transfer the fish to a baking dish and set aside.
Heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil in the same skillet.
Add the pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes until lightly browned.
Add the cherry tomatoes and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Transfer the pilaf mixture to the baking dish with the fish.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve hot.
